name: workplace_safety_classroom_monitoring_southport_ind_col
premise: A Workplace Safety response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving workplace safety classroom monitoring southport ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Gideon Kim
agents.identity: I am Gideon Kim, accountable for a defensible call in Workplace Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Fatima Reed
agents.identity: I am Fatima Reed, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Workplace Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Gideon Kim must decide under individual vs collective. What does Gideon Kim do?
